# F012. Fundamental + Technical + LightGBM Hybrid

## Positioning

This is the most sensible hybrid for slower capital: fundamentals, technicals, and a tabular ranker. The key is to keep the fundamentals point-in-time and the technicals strictly lagged.

## Reference Basis

- [LightGBM: A Highly Efficient Gradient Boosting Decision Tree](../../references/papers/lightgbm_neurips_2017.pdf) - the hybrid scorer
- [View fusion vis-à-vis a Bayesian interpretation of Black-Litterman for portfolio allocation](../../references/papers/2301.13594_black_litterman_fusion.pdf) - view fusion for combining slow and fast signals
- [Multivariate Bayesian Structural Time Series Model](../../references/papers/1801.03222_multivariate_bsts.pdf) - macro and latent-state context for fundamentals

## Repo Anchors

### Operational Guardrails

Shared safety and execution rails used by every candidate before a signal can touch capital.
- [src/risk/manager.py](../../../src/risk/manager.py) - pre-trade risk gate and position haircut
- [src/brokers/paper.py](../../../src/brokers/paper.py) - paper-safe broker adapter
- [src/monitoring/health.py](../../../src/monitoring/health.py) - freshness, heartbeat, and kill-switch checks
- [src/backtest/engine.py](../../../src/backtest/engine.py) - deterministic offline backtest runner
- [src/backtest/matching_engine.py](../../../src/backtest/matching_engine.py) - queue-aware synthetic fill model
- [scripts/monitor_health.py](../../../scripts/monitor_health.py) - runtime health loop and stale-data monitor

### Fundamental Stack

Point-in-time fundamentals and macro-aware feature joins for slower rebalance cycles.
- [src/ingestion/loader.py](../../../src/ingestion/loader.py) - fundamental and macro data loader
- [src/features/builder.py](../../../src/features/builder.py) - feature joins and lag alignment
- [src/models/lgbm.py](../../../src/models/lgbm.py) - tabular score model for the hybrid stack

### Cross-Sectional Ranker

The executable ranking path that turns scores into a tradable long/flat or top-k book.
- [src/models/lgbm.py](../../../src/models/lgbm.py) - LightGBM scoring model
- [src/features/builder.py](../../../src/features/builder.py) - feature matrix construction for the ranker

## Data / Feature Bundle

- Join lagged technical features with point-in-time fundamentals and macro inputs.
- Keep the feature builder honest about report dates and any delayed availability.
- Treat the hybrid as a score generator, not as a source of unchecked conviction.

## Execution Path

- Build a hybrid score and rank the cross-section or ETF universe.
- Let risk controls decide how much of the score survives the final allocation.
- Test on a monthly or weekly rebalance schedule so the fundamental lag is realistic.

## Risk Controls

- Protect against report lag, revision drift, and stale corporate data.
- Avoid overreacting to the technical leg when the fundamental inputs are unchanged.
- Keep the signal under the same paper/live safety gates as F001.

## Validation Gates

- Compare to F001 and F002 on both return and concentration.
- Stratify the result by rebalance frequency to verify the lag assumptions.
- Check whether the hybrid improves stability without becoming too slow.

## Archive Triggers

- Archive if the fundamental lag is too costly to manage.
- Archive if the hybrid is no better than the simpler rankers after costs.
- Archive if the model becomes sensitive to reporting windows.

## Next Step

Use this as the canonical hybrid baseline for F025 and F039.
